input: session sequences (ordered item clicks within a session)
output: next item prediction (ranked list of items)
backbone: Multi-granularity Intent Heterogeneous Session Graph (MIHSG) with GNN
key_idea: construct a heterogeneous session graph with multi-granularity intent units (individual items and consecutive item groups) to capture high-level user intents and long-range dependencies
datasets: five session-based recommendation datasets (not named in abstract)
